SELECT      bond.bond_type,      CASE          WHEN molecule.label = '+' THEN 'Carcinogenic'          ELSE 'Not Carcinogenic'      END AS carcinogenic_status FROM      bond JOIN      molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id WHERE      molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY      bond.bond_type ORDER BY      COUNT(bond.bond_id) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label FROM molecule m JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '-'  ORDER BY m.label LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS average_bonds FROM (     SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count     FROM atom a     LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id     WHERE a.element = 'i'     GROUP BY a.atom_id )	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT molecule.label, COUNT(bond.bond_id) AS double_bond_count FROM molecule JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id WHERE bond.bond_type = '=' GROUP BY molecule.label ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (     SELECT molecule_id     FROM molecule     WHERE label = '-' ) GROUP BY element ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH element_counts AS (   SELECT a.element, COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS atom_count   FROM connected c   JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id   GROUP BY a.element ), most_common_elements AS (   SELECT element   FROM element_counts   ORDER BY atom_count DESC   LIMIT 1 ), bond_counts AS (   SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_bonds   FROM bond ), common_bond_counts AS (   SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS common_bond_count   FROM connected c   JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id   JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id   WHERE a1.element IN (SELECT element FROM most_common_elements)     AND a2.element IN (SELECT element FROM most_common_elements) ) SELECT (CAST(common_bond_count AS REAL) / total_bonds) * 100 AS percentage FROM bond_counts, common_bond_counts	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH single_bonds AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_single_bonds     FROM bond     WHERE bond_type = '-' ), carcinogenic_bonds AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS carcinogenic_count     FROM bond     WHERE bond_type = '-' AND molecule_id IN (         SELECT molecule_id         FROM molecule         WHERE label = '+'     ) ) SELECT      CAST(carcinogenic_count AS REAL) / CAST(total_single_bonds AS REAL) * 100 AS proportion_carcinogenic FROM single_bonds, carcinogenic_bonds	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT hero_id FROM hero_attribute WHERE attribute_value = (SELECT MIN(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute)	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT full_name FROM superhero WHERE superhero_name = 'Alien'	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT full_name  FROM superhero  WHERE weight_kg < 100 AND eye_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Brown')	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT ha.attribute_value  FROM superhero s  JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id  WHERE s.superhero_name = 'Aquababy'	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT weight_kg, (SELECT race FROM race WHERE id = superhero.race_id) AS race  FROM superhero  WHERE id = 40	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT AVG(height_cm) AS average_height FROM superhero WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'Neutral')	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT ha.hero_id  FROM hero_attribute ha  JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id  WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Intelligence'	----- bird -----	superhero
SELECT c.colour  FROM superhero s  JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id  WHERE s.full_name = 'Blackwulf'	----- bird -----	superhero

WITH average_height AS (   SELECT AVG(height_cm) AS avg_height   FROM superhero ) SELECT sp.power_name FROM hero_power hp JOIN superhero s ON hp.hero_id = s.id JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id WHERE s.height_cm > (SELECT avg_height * 0.8 FROM average_height)	----- bird -----	superhero

SELECT d.driverRef  FROM results r  JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId  WHERE r.raceId = 20 AND r.statusId = (SELECT statusId FROM status WHERE status = 'Disqualified')	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT d.surname  FROM qualifying q  JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId  WHERE q.raceId = 19  ORDER BY q.q2  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT DISTINCT r.year FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.location LIKE 'Shanghai'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT url FROM races  JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId  WHERE circuits.name = 'Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT r.name  FROM races r  JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId  WHERE c.country = 'Germany'	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT c.name AS circuitName, r.position AS circuitPosition FROM circuits c JOIN results r ON c.circuitId = r.constructorId JOIN constructors co ON r.constructorId = co.constructorId WHERE co.name = 'Renault'	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT r.name  FROM races r  JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId  WHERE c.country = 'Spain'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE circuitId = (SELECT circuitId FROM races WHERE name = 'Australian Grand Prix')	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT r.raceId, r.name, r.date, r.time, r.url  FROM races r  JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId  WHERE c.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT time FROM races  WHERE circuitId = (SELECT circuitId FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Sepang International Circuit')	----- bird -----	formula_1

WITH race_info AS (     SELECT raceId     FROM races     WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix' ), champion AS (     SELECT r.driverId, r.time AS champion_time     FROM results r     JOIN race_info ri ON r.raceId = ri.raceId     WHERE r.position = 1 ), last_place AS (     SELECT r.driverId, r.time AS last_place_time     FROM results r     JOIN race_info ri ON r.raceId = ri.raceId     WHERE r.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = ri.raceId) ) SELECT      (CAST(last_place.last_place_time AS INTEGER) - CAST(champion.champion_time AS INTEGER)) * 100.0 / CAST(last_place.last_place_time AS INTEGER) AS percentage_faster FROM champion, last_place	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, lt.time  FROM lapTimes lt  JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId  JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId  WHERE r.name = 'French Grand Prix' AND lt.lap = 3  ORDER BY lt.milliseconds DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT raceId, MIN(milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_time FROM lapTimes WHERE lap = 1 GROUP BY raceId ORDER BY fastest_lap_time LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) AS average_fastest_lap_time FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix') AND positionOrder <= 10	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, AVG(p.duration) AS avg_duration FROM drivers d JOIN pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31' GROUP BY d.driverId ORDER BY avg_duration ASC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.date, res.time FROM results res JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2008 AND res.positionOrder = 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url  FROM constructorResults cr  JOIN results r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId  JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId  JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId  WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.positionOrder = 1	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, dob  FROM drivers  WHERE nationality = 'Austrian' AND dob BETWEEN '1981-01-01' AND '1991-12-31'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url, dob  FROM drivers  WHERE nationality = 'German' AND dob BETWEEN '1971-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'  ORDER BY dob DESC	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT location, country, lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Hungaroring'	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT cr.points, c.name, c.nationality FROM constructorResults cr JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 ORDER BY cr.points DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT AVG(results.points) AS average_score FROM results JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND races.name LIKE '%Turkish Grand Prix%'	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT year, COUNT(raceId) AS number_of_races FROM races WHERE year BETWEEN 2001 AND 2010 GROUP BY year	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT nationality, COUNT(*) as count FROM drivers GROUP BY nationality ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT wins FROM driverStandings WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM driverStandings WHERE position = 91)	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT r.name  FROM results AS res  JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId  WHERE res.fastestLapSpeed = (SELECT MAX(fastestLapSpeed) FROM results)	----- bird -----	formula_1
SELECT c.name, c.location, c.country  FROM circuits c  JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId  ORDER BY r.date DESC, r.time DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name FROM qualifying q JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId WHERE r.round = 3 AND r.year = 2008 AND r.circuitId = (SELECT circuitId FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit') AND q.position = 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race FROM drivers d JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers) LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, SUM(ds.wins) AS totalWins FROM drivers d JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers) GROUP BY d.driverId	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT r.name, r.date, r.time  FROM races r  JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId  WHERE c.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT c.lat, c.lng  FROM circuits c  JOIN lapTimes l ON c.circuitId = (SELECT r.circuitId FROM races r WHERE r.raceId = l.raceId)  WHERE l.time = '1:29.488'	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT      SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS InPatientCount,     SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OutPatientCount,     CASE          WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)          THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)         ELSE (SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)     END AS DeviationPercentage FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'M'	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND Birthday > '1930-01-01' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Female_Percentage FROM      Patient	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

SELECT      SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Outpatient,     SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Inpatient,     CASE          WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0         ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /               SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)     END AS Ratio FROM Patient WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

SELECT event.event_name  FROM event  JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event  WHERE budget.spent < (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id)	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT      (SUM(e.cost) / (SELECT SUM(b.amount) FROM budget b JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id WHERE ev.type = 'Meeting')) * 100 AS percentage_cost FROM      expense e JOIN      budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id JOIN      event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id WHERE      ev.type = 'Meeting'	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT b.budget_id, b.amount FROM budget b JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%Water%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%Chips%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%Cookies%' ORDER BY b.amount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_spent FROM member m JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, m.phone FROM member m JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense) GROUP BY m.member_id	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member)       FROM member m       JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code       WHERE z.state = 'New Jersey') -      (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member)       FROM member m       JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code       WHERE z.state = 'Vermont') AS percentage_difference	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name, maj.department  FROM member m  JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id  WHERE m.first_name = 'Garrett' AND m.last_name = 'Gerke'	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, e.cost FROM expense e JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT m.last_name, m.phone FROM member m JOIN major j ON m.link_to_major = j.major_id WHERE j.major_name = 'Elementary Education'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT b.category, b.amount  FROM budget b  JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id  WHERE e.event_name = 'January Speaker'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT e.event_name  FROM event e  JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event  WHERE b.category = 'Food'	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT member.first_name || ' ' || member.last_name AS full_name, income.amount FROM income JOIN member ON income.link_to_member = member.member_id WHERE income.date_received = '2019-09-09'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT b.category  FROM budget b  JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget  WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%Posters%'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, maj.college FROM member m JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id WHERE m.position = 'Secretary'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT e.event_name, SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent FROM budget b JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE b.category = 'Speaker Gifts' GROUP BY e.event_name	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT z.city, z.state FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code WHERE m.first_name = 'Garrett' AND m.last_name = 'Gerke'	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name AS full_name, position  FROM member  WHERE zip = 28092	----- bird -----	student_club
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM gasstations  WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Premium'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /      NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio FROM      customers	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT CustomerID, Consumption  FROM yearmonth  WHERE Date LIKE '201201%'  AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM')  ORDER BY Consumption ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT AVG(Consumption) AS AverageMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME') AND Date LIKE '2013%'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date LIKE '2011%' GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' AND ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND ym.Consumption < 30000	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CZK_Consumption,     COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS EUR_Consumption,     COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) -      COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS Consumption_Difference FROM      yearmonth ym JOIN      customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE      ym.Date LIKE '2012%'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS Year, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID WHERE customers.Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY Year ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM customers JOIN yearmonth ON customers.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID GROUP BY Segment ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS Year, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID WHERE customers.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY Year ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Date, MAX(Consumption) AS PeakConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME')   AND Date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY Date ORDER BY PeakConsumption DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH annual_consumption AS (     SELECT          c.Segment,         AVG(ym.Consumption) AS AvgConsumption     FROM          customers c     JOIN          yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID     WHERE          ym.Date LIKE '2013%'         AND c.Currency = 'CZK'     GROUP BY          c.Segment ), min_consumption AS (     SELECT          Segment,         MIN(AvgConsumption) AS MinConsumption     FROM          annual_consumption     GROUP BY          Segment ) SELECT      a.Segment AS Segment1,     b.Segment AS Segment2,     (a.MinConsumption - b.MinConsumption) AS ConsumptionDifference FROM      min_consumption a JOIN      min_consumption b ON a.Segment < b.Segment ORDER BY      a.Segment, b.Segment	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH Consumption2012 AS (     SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption2012     FROM yearmonth ym     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '201201%' OR ym.Date LIKE '201202%'     AND c.Currency = 'EUR'     GROUP BY c.Segment ), Consumption2013 AS (     SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption2013     FROM yearmonth ym     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '201301%' OR ym.Date LIKE '201302%'     AND c.Currency = 'EUR'     GROUP BY c.Segment ) SELECT      COALESCE(c2013.Segment, c2012.Segment) AS Segment,     COALESCE(c2013.TotalConsumption2013, 0) AS TotalConsumption2013,     COALESCE(c2012.TotalConsumption2012, 0) AS TotalConsumption2012,     CASE          WHEN COALESCE(c2012.TotalConsumption2012, 0) = 0 THEN NULL         ELSE (COALESCE(c2013.TotalConsumption2013, 0) - COALESCE(c2012.TotalConsumption2012, 0)) / COALESCE(c2012.TotalConsumption2012, 0) * 100     END AS PercentageIncrease FROM Consumption2012 c2012 FULL OUTER JOIN Consumption2013 c2013 ON c2012.Segment = c2013.Segment ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT SUM(Price * Amount) AS TotalConsumption FROM transactions_1k WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '2013-08-01' AND '2013-11-30'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Value for money') -     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Value for money') AS DiscountDifference	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Consumption), 0)       FROM yearmonth       WHERE CustomerID = 7 AND Date LIKE '201304%') -      (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Consumption), 0)       FROM yearmonth       WHERE CustomerID = 5 AND Date LIKE '201304%') AS ConsumptionDifference	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_CZK,     SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_EUR,     (SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS Difference FROM      customers c JOIN      transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID WHERE      c.Segment = 'SME'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, MAX(ym.Consumption) AS HighestConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'    AND c.Currency = 'EUR'    AND ym.Date LIKE '201310%' GROUP BY c.CustomerID	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2013-05'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN y.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Percentage FROM      customers c JOIN      yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE      c.Segment = 'LAM'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS ValueForMoneyCount FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Value for money' GROUP BY Country ORDER BY ValueForMoneyCount DESC	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Percentage_EUR FROM      customers c WHERE      c.Segment = 'KAM'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Consumption > 528.3 THEN CustomerID END) * 100.0) /      COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS Percentage FROM      yearmonth WHERE      Date = '201202'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS PremiumPercentage FROM      gasstations WHERE      Country = 'SVK'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '201309%' ORDER BY Consumption DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE ym.Date LIKE '201309%' GROUP BY c.Segment ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, MIN(ym.Consumption) AS LeastConsumption FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND ym.Date LIKE '201206%' GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY LeastConsumption LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS HighestMonthlyConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM customers c JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND ym.Consumption > 1000	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT p.Description  FROM transactions_1k t  JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID  JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID  WHERE g.Country = 'CZE'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT DISTINCT Time  FROM transactions_1k  WHERE GasStationID IN (SELECT GasStationID FROM gasstations WHERE ChainID = 11)	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TransactionCount FROM transactions_1k t JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID WHERE g.Country = 'CZE' AND t.Price > 1000	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TransactionCount FROM transactions_1k WHERE GasStationID IN (     SELECT GasStationID     FROM gasstations     WHERE Country = 'CZE' ) AND Date > '2012-01-01'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.Currency  FROM customers c  JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID  WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-24' AND t.Time = '16:25:00'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT c.Segment  FROM customers c  JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID  WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-23' AND t.Time = '21:20:00'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) FROM customers)) AS Percentage FROM      customers c JOIN      transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID WHERE      c.Currency = 'EUR' AND      t.Date = '2012-08-25'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH consumption_2012 AS (     SELECT Consumption     FROM yearmonth     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID                          FROM transactions_1k                          WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')     AND Date LIKE '2012%' ), consumption_2013 AS (     SELECT Consumption     FROM yearmonth     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID                          FROM transactions_1k                          WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')     AND Date LIKE '2013%' ) SELECT      (COALESCE(c2013.Consumption, 0) - COALESCE(c2012.Consumption, 0)) /      NULLIF(c2012.Consumption, 0) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate FROM      consumption_2012 c2012,     consumption_2013 c2013	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT GasStationID, SUM(Amount * Price) AS Revenue FROM transactions_1k GROUP BY GasStationID ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN g.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS PremiumPercentage FROM      gasstations g WHERE      g.Country = 'SVK'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) AS TotalSpentAtGasStations,     (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Consumption), 0)       FROM yearmonth       WHERE CustomerID = 38508 AND Date LIKE '201201%') AS TotalSpentInJanuary2012 FROM      transactions_1k t WHERE      t.CustomerID = 38508	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT p.Description, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalSold FROM products p JOIN transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalSold DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID,         AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePrice,         c.Currency  FROM customers c  JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID  GROUP BY c.CustomerID  ORDER BY SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT g.Country FROM gasstations g JOIN transactions_1k t ON g.GasStationID = t.GasStationID WHERE t.ProductID = 2 ORDER BY t.Price DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
